    [Documentation](https://motherduck.com/docs/sql-reference/mcp/)[Privacy Policy](https://motherduck.com/privacy-policy/)[Support](https://motherduck.com/docs/troubleshooting/support/)
    

Connect AI assistants to your MotherDuck data warehouse. Explore, visualize, and manage data using natural language–no SQL skills required. Create Dives: interactive visualizations that let you save and share answers with your team, staying up-to-date with your latest data. Works with real-world data without requiring semantic models or pre-configuration. Your AI assistant acts like a data analyst, exploring, validating, analyzing, and visualizing data iteratively to answer your questions.

You can use MotherDuck to:

**Answer Questions:** "Show me the top 10 customers by revenue last quarter"

**Create Visualizations:** "Create a Dive showing monthly revenue trends by product category"

**Iterate and Refine:** "Add a filter for US region only and change it to a stacked bar chart"

**Prepare Data:** "Create a view that shows active customers with their lifetime value"

**Data Exploration:** "What tables do I have in my sales database and what columns do they contain?"

**Get Help:** "How do I create a time-series analysis in MotherDuck?"
